description:
Receipt mainly in Arabic script issued by Abū Zikrī Kohen (وكتب يهودا بن يوسف). The name ʿAlī b. Khālid appears in Hebrew characters in the upper left corner, and the name Yehuda in Hebrew characters appears in the middle of the Arabic text of the document. Needs examination.

On verso the names Yehuda and Abū l-Ṭāhir ("ṣāḥib . . .") also appear. 

Compare ENA NS 83.338 (PGPID 35567).
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בJRL.
